summary: If false, the LEF_MUSTJOINALLPORTS property on a LEF PIN auto-creates MUSTJOIN pins for each PORT. If true, the MUSTJOIN pins are not created, but the router must connect to every port with a signal wire or signal via that physically overlaps all the ports.
description: If false, the LEF_MUSTJOINALLPORTS property on a LEF PIN auto-creates MUSTJOIN pins for each PORT. If true, the MUSTJOIN pins are not created, but the router must connect to every port with a signal wire or signal via that physically overlaps all the ports.
